templates.body:
PIE STAND-UP CHARTER
PIE = Problems, Incidents, Escalations

Eng lead: _______________  Support lead: _______________
Cadence: weekly  Length: 60 min
Equal airtime rule: Y
Out of scope this hour: _______________
First date: _______

PIE AGENDA (60)
0-5: parking lot / wins
5-20: PROBLEMS (active work both sides)
20-35: INCIDENTS (what worked / what failed this week)
35-55: ESCALATIONS (prioritize, assign, deep dive 1-2)
55-60: decisions + owners
Scribe: _______________

ESCALATION DEFINITION LOCK
May escalate when: _______________
Must not escalate when: _______________
Required packet before eng: repro / impact / what support tried
Bypass only if: safety / data loss / logo down
Effective: _______

ESCALATION SOURCE AUDIT
Period: _______

Esc ID | True tech gap | Training gap | Sales/SE cover | Other
_______ | | | |

% sales-cover: ___
Action on people/process (system first): _______________
Director path if founder/sales leadership is the source: _______________

KNOWLEDGE RETURN PATH
Repeat question: _______________
Eng time spent: ___
New KB / training item: _______________
Support owner: _______________  Due: _______
Escalation of this topic blocked after: _______

PIE DECISION LOG
Week: _______
Decision: _______________
Owner: _______________  Due: _______
Related esc/problem IDs: _______________
